value.value: @if(and(or(pipeline().parameters.flag_a, pipeline().parameters.flag_b), pipeline().parameters.flag_c), if(and(pipeline().parameters.flag_a, not(pipeline().parameters.flag_b)), if(equals(pipeline().parameters.env, 'prod'), 'PROD_PATH_A_ONLY', 'NON_PROD_PATH_A_ONLY'), if(or(and(pipeline().parameters.flag_a, pipeline().parameters.flag_b), and(not(pipeline().parameters.flag_a), pipeline().parameters.flag_c)), 'COMBINED_AB_OR_C_PATH', 'FALLBACK_MIXED')), if(and(not(pipeline().parameters.flag_a), not(pipeline().parameters.flag_b)), if(pipeline().parameters.flag_c, 'ISOLATED_C_ONLY', 'ALL_FLAGS_FALSE'), 'PARTIAL_DISABLED'))

@if(and(or(equals(variables('eval_result'), 'PROD_PATH_A_ONLY'), equals(variables('eval_result'), 'NON_PROD_PATH_A_ONLY')), not(equals(pipeline().parameters.env, 'staging'))), concat('BRANCH_PRIMARY_', pipeline().parameters.env), if(and(equals(variables('eval_result'), 'COMBINED_AB_OR_C_PATH'), or(pipeline().parameters.flag_a, pipeline().parameters.flag_b)), 'BRANCH_COMBINED_ACTIVE', if(or(equals(variables('eval_result'), 'ALL_FLAGS_FALSE'), equals(variables('eval_result'), 'PARTIAL_DISABLED')), 'BRANCH_DISABLED', 'BRANCH_DEFAULT')))

@if(and(or(pipeline().parameters.flag_a, pipeline().parameters.flag_c), equals(pipeline().parameters.env, 'prod')), concat('APPROVED_', variables('branch_label'), '_', variables('eval_result')), if(and(not(pipeline().parameters.flag_b), or(equals(pipeline().parameters.env, 'dev'), equals(pipeline().parameters.env, 'staging'))), concat('REVIEW_', variables('branch_label'), '_', pipeline().parameters.env), concat('PENDING_', variables('eval_result'))))

@if(and(or(contains(variables('final_output'), 'APPROVED'), contains(variables('final_output'), 'REVIEW')), not(contains(variables('final_output'), 'REJECTED'))), concat('AUDIT_PASS|flags=', string(pipeline().parameters.flag_a), ',', string(pipeline().parameters.flag_b), ',', string(pipeline().parameters.flag_c), '|env=', pipeline().parameters.env, '|result=', variables('final_output')), if(and(contains(variables('final_output'), 'REJECTED'), or(not(pipeline().parameters.flag_a), not(pipeline().parameters.flag_c))), concat('AUDIT_FAIL|reason=flags_disabled|output=', variables('final_output')), concat('AUDIT_WARN|output=', variables('final_output'))))

url.value: @if(and(or(equals(pipeline().parameters.env, 'prod'), equals(pipeline().parameters.env, 'staging')), not(contains(variables('eval_result'), 'AUDIT_FAIL'))), concat('https://hooks.internal.corp/', pipeline().parameters.env, '/pipeline-results'), if(and(equals(pipeline().parameters.env, 'dev'), or(pipeline().parameters.flag_a, pipeline().parameters.flag_b)), 'https://hooks.internal.corp/dev/pipeline-results-debug', 'https://hooks.internal.corp/default/pipeline-results'))

body.value: @json(concat('{"pipeline":"nested_ternary_bool_evaluation","env":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","flag_a":', string(pipeline().parameters.flag_a), ',"flag_b":', string(pipeline().parameters.flag_b), ',"flag_c":', string(pipeline().parameters.flag_c), ',"eval_result":"', variables('eval_result'), '","final_output":"', variables('final_output'), '","branch_label":"', variables('branch_label'), '"}'))
